info.name: Lab Debug Endpoint Complete PoC
author: local
info.description: Detects the local debug endpoint with status, header, and body evidence.

request:
GET /debug HTTP/1.1
Host: 127.0.0.1:8010
User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (ZZ; Linux i686) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/130.0.0.0 Safari/537.36
Connection: close
Accept: */*
Accept-Language: en
Accept-Encoding: gzip
response:
HTTP/1.0 200 OK
Connection: close
Content-Length: 137
Content-Type: application/json
Date: Sat, 09 May 2026 02:50:11 GMT
Server: NucleiLab/0.2
Set-Cookie: lab_session=guest; HttpOnly; Path=/
X-Debug-Mode: enabled
X-Lab-Target: nuclei-local-training
X-Powered-By: Express

{
  "app": "AcmeNotes",
  "version": "1.4.2-dev",
  "debug": true,
  "build": "2026.05.09-lab",
  "debug_marker": "debug-panel-enabled"
}
curl-command: curl -X 'GET' -d '' -H 'Accept: */*' -H 'Accept-Language: en' -H 'User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (ZZ; Linux i686) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/130.0.0.0 Safari/537.36' 'http://127.0.0.1:8010/debug'
